---
title: "‘Nurse’s Pocket’ in Jack Frost’s Little Prisoners. : A Collection of Stories for Children from Four to Twelve Years of Age. By Stella Austin. S. Baring-Gould. Caroline Birley. Lord Brabourne. ("
---

## ‘Nurse’s Pocket’ in Jack Frost’s Little Prisoners. : A Collection of Stories for Children from Four to Twelve Years of Age. By Stella Austin. S. Baring-Gould. Caroline Birley. Lord Brabourne. (

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1886
**Genre:** Fiction
**Format:** Story in collection.

**Publisher:** London: William Skeffington, 163 Piccadilly.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
